rows.label: qev092604_MSG0002
rows.name:
Toton is like egg. Bird
would not eat egg, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0005
rows.name: Did friends come to help Toton?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Toton that he's safe now.

rows.label: qev092604_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Toton that Tora negotiated
for your assistance.

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0007
rows.name:
Tora sealed interspecies
deal? Toton so proud![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0008
rows.name:
Legend of legendary merchant
Toton almost came to end today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0009
rows.name:
Only survived until now by
method acting as giant egg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0010
rows.name:
Whatever it takes to see loving
wifeypon and sonnypon again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0011_m
rows.name:
So come. Friends and Toton
hurry back to family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092604_MSG0011_f
rows.name:
So come. Friends and Toton
hurry back to family.[ST:wait ]
